register.title: Create organization
register.subtitle: Set up your OKR workspace
register.slugValidation: Lowercase letters, numbers and hyphens only

profile.title: Profile preferences
profile.atRiskDesc: When a KR drops below 40% confidence
profile.checkinReminderDesc: If you haven't updated a KR for 7 days

org.sectionDesc: Public name and URL of your organization.
org.slugInfo: The slug is part of invitation URLs and your organization's portal. Changing it would break all active links, so the system does not allow it once created.
org.modeDesc: Determines which modules and workflows are active across the organization.
org.modeWarning1: Changing the mode affects the menu for all users instantly.
org.modeWarning2: Sprints and backlog will be hidden and locked.
org.sectorDesc: The sector configures the terminology used by the platform (cycles, teams, members, etc.).

users.removeConfirmDesc: This person will immediately lose access. Their OKRs and check-ins are preserved in the system.

permissions.title: Menu permissions by profile
permissions.desc: Control which sections each user profile can see. The Owner always has full access. Use templates to quickly pre-configure.

screens.title: Navigation menu names
screens.desc: Customize the names of each section and screen to adapt the vocabulary to your organization. Changes are visible to all users.

security.mfaSubtitle: Adds an extra layer of security to your account
security.mfaCodePrompt: Enter the code from your app to confirm.
security.revokeSessionsDesc: Revokes all your active tokens on all devices.

privacy.exportDesc: Download a JSON file with all your OKRs, check-ins and profile (GDPR Art. 20).
privacy.deleteDesc: Anonymizes all your personal data. This action cannot be undone (GDPR Art. 17).
privacy.deleteWarning: Your name, email and personal notes will be permanently anonymized.

traceability.title: Traceability
traceability.description: Visualize how diagnostics, strategies and OKRs connect in the complete cascade.

guide.title: How the system works
guide.description: Complete hierarchy guide: diagnosis → intention → OKRs → initiative → epic → feature → story
guide.sub: Agile · Cascade · Hybrid — rules and connections explained

welcome.title: Home Dashboard
welcome.description: Personalized panoramic view: cycle progress, urgent alerts, my OKRs and governance agenda
welcome.sub: Cycle health · my pending check-ins · 14-day agenda

execDash.title: Executive Dashboard
execDash.description: Full cycle view: heat map by level, progress and at-risk KRs

risk.title: Risk Dashboard
risk.description: At-risk KRs, check-in cadence and Risk Sentinel analysis

briefing.title: Executive Briefing
briefing.description: Weekly AI-generated summary: highlights, risks and next steps

health.title: Cycle Health
health.description: Status distribution, confidence, weekly trend and closure projection

teamHealth.title: Team Health
teamHealth.description: Progress, confidence and check-in cadence by team

portfolio.title: Initiatives Portfolio
portfolio.description: All initiatives organized by team with status and progress

milestones.title: Milestones Calendar
milestones.description: Initiative milestones due in the next 30 days
milestones.noneNext30: No milestones in the next 30 days

activity.title: Activity Feed
activity.description: Recent team check-ins in chronological order
activity.sub: Filterable by team, with notes and mood

governance.title: OKR Governance
governance.description: Governance agenda: kickoffs, reviews, retrospectives and strategic reviews from configured cycles

cycles.title: OKR Cycles
cycles.levelStrategicDesc: The reference framework for the entire organization. Defines the long-term direction all other cycles must follow.
cycles.levelAnnualDesc: Turns the strategic plan into concrete goals for the year. Annual OKRs must be measurable when the cycle closes.
cycles.levelQuarterlyDesc: 90-day cycles where teams execute the strategy. They are the main operational cadence for tactical OKRs.
cycles.hierarchyDesc: Follow the recommended order to align long-term vision with daily execution.
cycles.emptyDesc: Create your first cycle to start managing OKRs.

checkins.title: Check-ins & Progress
checkins.description: Update the progress of your Key Results
checkins.noCycleDesc: Activate a cycle to see check-ins and KR progress.
checkins.noPendingDesc: No KRs at risk right now. Great team work!
checkins.noResultsFilters: No KRs match the selected filters.
checkins.noActiveKrs: No active KRs in this cycle.

strategy.title: Strategic map
strategy.description: Define the long-term big bets that guide all OKRs.
strategy.visionPlaceholder: Write your organization's vision here: where do you want to be in 5-10 years?
strategy.visionHint: Vision is the destination; strategic intents are the path to get there.
strategy.formDescription: Define where your organization wants to go in the coming years.
strategy.fieldTitlePlaceholder: e.g. Become innovation leaders in LATAM
strategy.emptyDesc: Define the strategic north of your organization.
strategy.aiSuggestionsDesc: Based on problems from the organizational diagnosis. Create the ones you find relevant.
strategy.aiError: Error generating suggestions. Check that the AI API is configured and try again.
strategy.aiEmpty: No suggestions were generated. Try adding more detail to the diagnostics.
strategy.allCompletedMsg: All objectives are completed. The cycle can be cleanly closed.
strategy.irreversibleMsg: This action is irreversible. A snapshot of the final state will be generated.
strategy.flowBannerDesc: They are your organization's big bets for the coming years. They derive from the diagnosis and become the compass that guides all OKRs. Without them, operational objectives lose direction.
strategy.aiSuggestDesc: You have {n} problem logged|You have {n} problems logged
strategy.aiSuggestDesc2: in the diagnosis. The assistant can analyze those pains and propose the most relevant intents.

initiatives.title: Initiatives
initiatives.description: Projects linked to the team's Key Results
initiatives.emptyDesc: Initiatives link concrete projects to your team's KRs.
initiatives.overdueMilestone: {n, plural, one {# overdue milestone} other {# overdue milestones}}
initiatives.noCycleDesc: Activate a cycle to manage initiatives.

welcome.title: Home
welcome.trialExpiredAdmin: Contact the administrator to extend or activate your plan.
welcome.noCycleDesc: Activate a cycle in the Cycles section.
welcome.trialLabelDaysAndHours: {n, plural, one {# day} other {# days}} and {h}h
welcome.quickStrategicDesc: OKRs and KRs of the cycle
welcome.agreementsOverdue: {count, plural, one {{count} overdue agreement} other {{count} overdue agreements}}
welcome.trialUrgentHeadlineDays: {n, plural, one {Only {n} day left!} other {Only {n} days left!}}
welcome.trialUrgentHeadlineHours: {n, plural, one {Only {n} hour left!} other {Only {n} hours left!}}
welcome.trialUrgentSub: Contact your administrator to renew access before it expires.
welcome.trialSub: Contact your administrator to renew before the period expires.

gettingStarted.title: Getting Started
gettingStarted.description: Create your first OKR in 7 steps. Estimated time: 30 minutes.
gettingStarted.completedBanner: Completed! You have your first OKR.
gettingStarted.howToUseDesc: Click each step to see detailed instructions.

aiAssistant.title: AI Assistant
aiAssistant.description: Strategic advisor with context from your OKRs
aiAssistant.agentDesc: Strategic advisor with context from your OKRs
aiAssistant.placeholder: Ask me about your strategy, OKRs, risks or how to improve execution. Use @ to reference an objective.
aiAssistant.errorMsg: An error occurred contacting the Strategy Advisor. Please try again.
aiAssistant.disclaimer: Responses are AI-generated and include context from the active cycle.

upgrade.pageSubtitle: Start for free and scale when you're ready.
upgrade.terms: By completing payment you accept the terms of service. You can cancel at any time.
upgrade.cancelledMsg: Payment was cancelled. You can try again whenever you want.
upgrade.trialExpiresSoon: Your trial expires on {date}. Upgrade now to keep your access.
upgrade.trialExpired: Your free trial has expired. Upgrade to regain access.

planFree.name: Free
planFree.tagline: Get started with OKRs at no cost.

planPro.name: Pro
planPro.tagline: For teams that execute strategy seriously.

planEnterprise.name: Enterprise
planEnterprise.tagline: Multiple orgs, SSO, and dedicated SLA.

sprints.title: Sprints
sprints.description: Manage sprints for the active cycle
sprints.emptyDesc: Generate sprints automatically for the cycle or create one manually.
sprints.noCycleDesc: Activate an OKR cycle to create sprints.

backlog.title: Backlog
backlog.description: User stories and epics linked to OKRs
backlog.emptyDesc: Create epics to organize features and user stories linked to your initiatives.
backlog.noCycleDesc: Activate a cycle to view the backlog.

delivery.title: Deliverables
delivery.description: Schedule phases, documents and owners for each project stage.
delivery.newProgramDesc: Create a program to group phases and deliverables for your project.
delivery.deleteConfirmDesc: Delete {name}? All phases and deliverables will be removed. This action cannot be undone.
delivery.emptyDesc: Create your first delivery program to organize phases, documents and owners.

problems.title: Organizational Diagnosis
problems.description: Identify the pains and opportunities that guide your strategy
problems.problemDescription: Describe the pain or opportunity impacting your organization.
problems.descriptionHint: Manifestation (how it looks) · Root cause (why it happens) · Impact (who and how much)
problems.titlePlaceholder: e.g. High talent turnover in product area
problems.titleTooShort: Add more detail to describe the problem well.
problems.noProblemsTitle: Your organization has no logged pains yet
problems.noProblemsDesc: Start by identifying the main challenges.

strategic.title: Strategic OKRs
strategic.description: Define and manage your organization's long-term and annual objectives.
strategic.noCyclesDesc: Activate at least one cycle (strategic or annual) to start defining objectives.
strategic.hierarchyDesc: Start with long-term objectives before breaking down into annual and tactical goals.
strategic.blockedStrategic: Activate a strategic cycle (3 years) in the Cycles section to create these OKRs.
strategic.blockedAnnual: Activate an annual cycle in the Cycles section to create these OKRs.

strategic.title: Strategic OKRs
strategic.desc: Defines where the organization is heading over the next years. These are the most ambitious objectives: the north star guiding all decisions.

annual.title: Annual OKRs
annual.desc: Translates the strategic vision into concrete commitments for this year. Each annual objective must directly contribute to a strategic OKR.

tactical.title: Tactical OKRs
tactical.desc: Teams define their 90-day OKRs aligned to annual ones. This is where strategy turns into concrete, measurable execution.

strategic.emptyStrategicDesc: Define your organization's long-term vision and ambition.
strategic.emptyAnnualDesc: Set what you want to achieve during this fiscal year.
strategic.krCount: {n, plural, one {# key result} other {# key results}}
strategic.confirmCancelDesc: All active key results will also be cancelled. This action cannot be undone.
strategic.descAnnual: What should the organization achieve during this fiscal year?
strategic.descDefault: Define the objective for this cycle.
strategic.objTitlePlaceholderStrategic: e.g. Become the innovation benchmark in Latin America
strategic.objTitlePlaceholderAnnual: e.g. Scale client base 40% while keeping churn < 5%
strategic.descHint: Context (why now) · Expected result (visible change) · Dependencies (what must be aligned)
strategic.contributionsSelected: {n, plural, one {# contribution selected} other {# contributions selected}}
strategic.removeAlignmentDesc: The alignment relationship with "{title}" will be removed. The main parent objective is not modified.
strategic.krTitlePlaceholder: e.g. Increase customer NPS from 30 to 60
strategic.krDescHint: Context, success criteria, how it's measured...

tactical.title: Tactical OKRs
tactical.description: Team and individual objectives for this quarter
tactical.descLoading: Team and individual objectives aligned to the strategy
tactical.noCycleDesc: Activate a quarterly cycle to start defining tactical objectives for teams and individuals.
tactical.emptyDesc: Create team and individual objectives aligned to strategic OKRs to execute the strategy day-to-day.
tactical.daysRemaining: {n, plural, one {# day remaining} other {# days remaining}}
tactical.confirmCancelMsg: Cancel this objective? This action cannot be undone.
tactical.krCount: {n, plural, one {# key result} other {# key results}}
tactical.confirmCancelDesc: All active key results will also be cancelled. This action cannot be undone.
tactical.removeAlignmentDescSimple: The relationship with "{title}" will be removed.
tactical.objTitlePlaceholder: e.g. Improve the onboarding of new clients
tactical.descHint: Context (why now) · Expected result (visible change) · Dependencies (what must be aligned)
tactical.contributionsSelected: {n, plural, one {# contribution selected} other {# contributions selected}}
tactical.krTitlePlaceholder: e.g. Reduce support response time to under 2h
tactical.krDescHint: Baseline (initial situation) · Measurement method · Main risk

consultantRoadmap.title: Consultant Roadmap
consultantRoadmap.subtitle: OKR implementation methodology for consulting commitments

docs.setupCycle: Set up a cycle for the first time

sectorAssessment.pageDesc: Manage collective diagnostic sessions for the 8 structural threats
sectorAssessment.noSessionsDesc: Create a session for multiple people to evaluate the 8 structural threats and get a consolidated diagnosis
sectorAssessment.newSessionDialogDesc: A session groups evaluations from multiple people for the same period
sectorAssessment.newAssessmentDesc: Complete the 8 structural threats with your perspective
sectorAssessment.evidencePlaceholder: Describe the current situation, relevant data or findings...
sectorAssessment.calibrationDesc: Average is automatic. Adjust if context justifies a different score.
sectorAssessment.uploadDesc: Upload surveys, interviews, reports or benchmarks. The AI agent will integrate them with scores in the analysis.
sectorAssessment.unsupportedFormat: Unsupported format. Use PDF, TXT, MD or CSV.
sectorAssessment.fileTooLarge: File exceeds the 10 MB limit. Cannot upload.
sectorAssessment.uploadHint: Drag or click — PDF, TXT, MD, CSV · max 10 MB
sectorAssessment.analyzingDesc: Identifies strengths, weaknesses and generates recommendations
sectorAssessment.aiAnalysisDesc: Identifies strengths, weaknesses, generates action plan with 30/90/180 day roadmap
sectorAssessment.addParticipantsHint: Add participants to track who has completed the diagnosis.
sectorAssessment.noParticipantsAdmin: The administrator has not yet defined the participant list.
sectorAssessment.addParticipantDesc: Select organization members who should complete this diagnosis.
sectorAssessment.noAssessmentsDesc: Be the first to add your individual assessment to this session
sectorAssessment.noCompletedAssessmentsDesc: At least one person must complete their assessment to see consolidation
sectorAssessment.noProfileDesc: You have not been assigned access to any diagnostic session. Contact the administrator to include you in a session.
sectorAssessment.participantDesc: Evaluate the 8 structural threats of the organization. Your individual assessment, along with those of other participants, will form part of the consolidated diagnosis.

consejo.title: Board Package
consejo.desc: High-level executive report for Board presentation

engagement.title: Engagement ROI
engagement.desc: What we agreed, what we achieved, and work we generated

gettingStartedWizard.wizardDesc: In 3 quick steps you'll be all set
gettingStartedWizard.hasCycle: You already have an active cycle

briefingCard.title: Your weekly briefing
briefingCard.generatePrompt: Generate your personalized briefing and arrive aligned to the meeting.
briefingCard.noAlerts: No pending alerts. The meeting can start in 5 minutes.
briefingCard.krsAtRisk: {count, plural, one {{count} KR at risk} other {{count} KRs at risk}}
briefingCard.urgentAgreements: {count, plural, one {{count} urgent agreement} other {{count} urgent agreements}}
briefingCard.activeStories: {count, plural, one {{count} active story} other {{count} active stories}}
briefingCard.mondayAction: {name}, for Monday meeting you need to:
briefingCard.mondayActionNoName: For Monday meeting you need to:

impactChain.completeChain: Complete chain — your work connects to the vision
impactChain.noInitiative: No initiative assigned — ask your leader to link the item to an initiative
impactChain.partialKr: Partial chain — link the initiative to a key result (KR)
impactChain.partialObj: Partial chain — the KR is not yet linked to an objective
impactChain.partialIntent: Partial chain — link the objective to a strategic intent
impactChain.partialVision: Partial chain — missing links to reach the vision
impactChain.noActiveItemsDesc: When you have a story or feature assigned, you will see here how your work connects to the company vision.

trialBanner.urgent: {n, plural, one {Only {n} day left! Your access expires soon.} other {Only {n} days left! Your access expires soon.}}
trialBanner.normal: Your access period expires in {n} days.
